description: Diagnose and improve the SAM.gov-first acquisition lead loop so configured controls and software-development sources produce visible actionable leads. Treat BidNet/BidBanana as resolver-only discovery unless they resolve to public canonical notices.

comments.text: Implemented scanner credential resolution fix: QuerySamGov now falls back to SourceCredentials.sam_gov_api_key/0 when no explicit run-context key is passed. Verified focused tests pass. Live SAM scans remain blocked because dev has no SAM.gov API key in env or Bitwarden; existing sam_gov Bitwarden credential points to item name SAM.gov but the Gnome Automation org currently only has bidnetdirect.com and SDCOC APEX eCenterDirect. Also fixed /opt/gnome-garden-shared/.config/bitwarden-cli ACL for user pc so the dev service can create Bitwarden CLI lock files.

title: Make SAM-first lead ingestion visible
